task_completion.description: Navigate to the Jenkins Snippet Generator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the Jenkins 'Pipeline Syntax' page with the 'Snippet Generator' tool visible.

task_completion.description: Configure the Git repository URL and branch
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snippet Generator form, the 'Repository URL' field contains 'https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot.git' and the 'Branch' (or 'Branches to build') field contains '2.7.x' or '*/2.7.x'.

task_completion.description: Add the required Git behaviors (Clean, Prune, Sub-directory)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form shows 'Additional Behaviors' configured: 'Clean before checkout', 'Prune stale remote-tracking branches', and 'Check out to a sub-directory' with 'sources' entered as the local subdirectory.
A Groovy script snippet is displayed in the text box below the 'Generate Pipeline Script' button, containing references to the configured Git settings.

task_completion.description: Save the generated script to the specified file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, text editor, or file manager shows the generated script being saved to or present in the file '/home/ga/spring_checkout_snippet.groovy'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jenkins Snippet Generator GUI to create the script
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent interacting with the Jenkins web interface to fill out the form and generate the script, rather than typing the Groovy script manually from scratch.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a real Jenkins instance
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar should show a local Jenkins address (e.g., localhost:8080 or similar), and the Jenkins UI should appear fully functional.

integrity.description: The saved script matches the generated snippet
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of '/home/ga/spring_checkout_snippet.groovy' should match the snippet generated in the Jenkins UI, confirming it was obtained via the Snippet Generator.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected repository URL is https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot.git, the branch is 2.7.x, and the subdirectory for checkout is 'sources'. The required Jenkins Git plugin extensions are CleanBeforeCheckout, PruneStaleBranch, and RelativeTargetDirectory. The output file should be saved to /home/ga/spring_checkout_snippet.groovy.
